prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-ASRO-CAMPINGLANTERNSET-3PC Product Type: ELECTRIC_LANTERN Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 3pc COB Collapsible Camping Lantern Set Hiking Gear Outdoor Lights Emergency Supplies, Assorted Colors Description: This set of collapsible camping lanterns may not have all the gizmos and gadgets that others come with nowadays, but if you just need a quality camping light, this set of three from ASR Outdoor do their primary function very well; and that is to provide 360 degree dense bright white, high quality, uniform lighting for camping, road tripping, if you’re stuck in a power outage, boating, hiking and more.

Equipped with COB technology, the ASR Outdoor camping lanterns have long lasting bulbs and come with batteries preinstalled, making them conveniently ready to use right out of the box. In addition, the outdoor lights feature a unique collapsible design, giving you control over the luminosity output, allowing for easy adjustments depending on how much you light you need across different indoor or outdoor scenarios. The camping lanterns also have built in, foldaway handles on the exterior body of the lantern, making them portable and quick to hang if needed; their compact sizes when fully collapsed contributes to their longevity and durability, while also making them lightweight and easy to tote packed, or hooked to the exterior of outdoor gear with a carabiner (not included).

Large Lantern Dimensions Open: 7.25 inches Large Lantern Dimensions Collapsed: 5 inches Small Lantern Dimensions Open: 5.5 inches Small Lantern Dimensions Collapsed: 3.25 inches

An outdoor essential, these collapsible outdoor lights can help prep a meal in the dark, make the perfect reading light in your tent, create ambiance for late night camp games and act as a staple in your roadside emergency car kit or general emergency supplies. And yes, you could just use a flashlight or headlamp, but these lightweight, portable adjustable lanterns make all your two handed tasks easier and more efficient with ambient lighting. Search Terms: Lantern hiking backpacking camping survival gear emergency car kit survival tools cob light fishing gear and equipment trekking camp table camping tent book light flashlight prepper power outage supplies bug out bag emergency kit for disaster preparedness Features: - EMERGENCY SURVIVAL KIT: A must have emergency preparedness item to include with a survival kit, disaster preparedness kit or roadside emergency car kit when thereâs no access to power or electricity; batteries are included with all camping lanterns making them ready to go right out of the box - CONVENIENT DIMMABLE LIGHT: Compact lantern features a great range of lighting that easily adjust via the dimmer switch on the front of the dimmable camping light; the lantern could also be used in a workshop or garage for extra lighting if needed - HANDS FREE LIGHTING: A sturdy plastic foldable hanging hook, allowing you to hang from just about anywhere, including the outside of a backpack or in your tent; due the mini lanterns light weight, coming in under 1 pound, the compact lantern can hang from just about anywhere with no extra support or hanging materials required - INDOOR AND OUTDOOR USE: This battery powered camping lamp is extraordinarily versatile; Use it while camping, fishing, hunting, trekking, climbing, during power outages, for auto maintenance, highway emergencies and more; the compact mini camping lantern is also a great item to add to your vehicle emergency preparedness bag, survival kit or bug out bag - SPECIFICATIONS: Color: Black or Silver; Dimensions: 8 inches tall x 3.5 inches wide; Weight: 0.44lbs; Brightness: 450 Lumen; Three (3) AA batteries are included for operation === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 3-pc Collapsible Camping Lantern Set
